subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Help the Reading Ranger complete the Answer Who, What, Where Questions trail.
lesson.objective: I can practice answer who, what, where questions with careful listening, reading, or writing.
lesson.concept_explanation: This mission teaches answer who, what, where questions using child-friendly models and short practice steps.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may answer from a first clue instead of checking the whole word, sentence, or story.
lesson.real_world_connection: Readers and writers use this skill in books, signs, notes, and classroom talk.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read or listen carefully, use the model, then choose or write the answer.
lesson.mini_lesson: First study the model. Then say the sounds or words slowly. Last, check that your answer matches the prompt.

worked_examples.text: Watch: Use the short_passage model, name the important part, then answer.
Demo: Try one with help before independent practice.

hint_ladder: Listen for the target sound or word part.
Check your answer with the model.

who_what_confusion: Review who what confusion with a teacher model.
where_detail_confusion: Review where detail confusion with a teacher model.
unsupported_answer: Review unsupported answer with a teacher model.
misses_text_evidence: Review misses text evidence with a teacher model.
